metadata.description: Terminal-native SOC skills for Claude Code, backed by Scanner MCP. Ports the n8n alert-triage, threat-hunting, and daily-reporting workflows to slash commands a SOC analyst can run from their laptop.

plugins.name: scanner-soc-skills
plugins.description: Five SOC skills: triage-alert (lookup an alert by id and investigate), threat-hunt (sweep historical logs for fresh threat-intel IOCs), generate-health-report (daily detection-engineering digest), investigate (free-form Scanner Q&A using a summarize -> plan -> execute pattern), and lookup-ioc (one-shot IOC reputation across ThreatFox, OTX, and Feodo Tracker). Requires Scanner MCP configured in Claude Code; the skills also use SCANNER_API_URL / SCANNER_API_KEY for the Detection Rules REST API and OTX_API_KEY / ABUSECH_AUTH_KEY for threat intel.
